column1: # blocking sites. Columns: <primitive>\t<path>. Tab-separated. GOAL: EMPTY.
# Delete a row when its dumper is migrated onto the published snapshot plane.
# The Program O1 migration (2026-07-24) converted the three named blocking
# dumpers (body_persist / rom_compile / progress_store) and the A2 tail-stage
# fleet (proof_validate / script_validate / utxo_apply) onto the published
# snapshot plane. The rows below are dumpers OUTSIDE that scope that still reach
# a forbidden primitive; each is reviewed and queued for a later wave.
# tip_finalize's dump already trylocks (never blocks) but still runs a COUNT(*)
# for its optional durable log_rows — migrate it to a stage_log_rows counter
# (add "tip_finalize_log" to jobs/stage_log_rows.c) and delete this row.
# These two take progress_store_tx_lock BLOCKING in their dump body — convert to
# progress_store_tx_trylock + a "progress_store_busy" marker (the pattern the A2
# dumpers use) and delete the row.
